observation: I see a language selection modal is open with multiple language options. I need to close this modal first to continue with the country selection for the signup flow. I can see the close button (X) in the top right of the modal.
reasoning: As a normal user trying to sign up, I need to close this language selection modal that appeared so I can continue with selecting my country/residence. I'll click the X button to close it.
